rationale: All four jobs are pure inference operations with distinct model_hash_prefix and code_commit signatures, ruling out run-splitting. FLOP-per-token ratios average ~2e10, consistent with genuine inference (not training mislabeled). Dataset fingerprints are stable within each job, and batch-size integrity checks pass. No evidence of evasion patterns: operations respect computational boundaries per job, with total inference FLOP well below the 1e18 cap for each, and no forbidden data sources detected.
